title: No Resting Place
writer: Gerard Healy, Colin Lesslie, Ian Niall
actors: Michael Gough, Eithne Dunne, Noel Purcell
plot: Alex Kyle is an Irish Traveller. Whilst out poaching he is disturbed by the local gamekeeper. In an attempt to escape he hurls a rock at the man and kills him. One veteran Garda Officer, Mannigan, is determined he will not escape ...
